top_signals.title: Who calls the shots? Trump and Netanyahu clash over war goals
top_signals.summary: US president’s frustration with continued Israeli attacks on Lebanon and Iran erupts as he pushes to end the war
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hackers Used Meta’s AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
top_signals.summary: The Instagram accounts for the Obama White House and the Chief Master Sergeant of the U.S. Space Force were briefly defaced with pro-Iranian images and messages over the weekend, after instructions began circulating on Telegram showing how to trick Meta's "AI support assistant" bot into resetting account passwords.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Morpho raises $175M in round co-led by Paradigm, a16z crypto and Ribbit Capital to build ‘open credit network’
top_signals.summary: Morpho plans to build an open blockchain-based credit network to connect decentralized finance, Wall Street, and global markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: LA Stadium Workers Avert Strike Days Before First World Cup Game
top_signals.summary: Workers at SoFi Stadium near Los Angeles reached a tentative agreement with management, averting the threat of a strike days before hosting the US team’s first World Cup football match.
